## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit or E2E as appropriate)
- [ ] Types are correct — no `any`, no `@ts-ignore` without comment
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] Memory files updated if architectural decisions changed
- [ ] `turbo run lint typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `turbo run test` passes locally
